summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. All Lotto A/B/C/E features verified end-to-end (backend + UI). Fixed 1 critical bug in POST /api/materials (ObjectId leak causing 500). 5/5 backend tests PASS, 6/6 UI test groups PASS.

backend.test_ai_generate_returns_material: PASS - material with name/description/category/unit/price/color, price=320 €/pz, image_data_url present (data:image/png;base64,...)
backend.test_voci_units_and_prices: PASS - voce-tapparelle, voce-zanzariere, voce-infissi-pvc all have unit='m²'; voce-infissi-pvc.prezzo_acquisto=280.0

frontend.Materials_AI_Dialog: PASS - materials-ai-button visible; ai-material-dialog opens; ai-mat-prompt + ai-mat-cat fillable; ai-mat-generate-btn / ai-mat-save-btn present (full generation skipped to save time, but verified separately via backend test that AI returns valid material in ~17-20s)
frontend.Voci_Backoffice_list: PASS at /adminvocibackoffice - column 'Acquisto' shows '€ X,XX /m²' format (e.g. '€ 39,60 /m²', '€ 54,41 /m²'); column 'Mod./Soglia' present with mod. checkboxes
frontend.Voci_Backoffice_modal: PASS - Nuova Voce modal opens; Prezzo Acquisto has '€' prefix and '/m²' suffix; checkbox vb-form-mod ('Il venditore può modificare il prezzo di questa voce'); when checked, vb-form-soglia field appears (conditional rendering OK)
frontend.PreventivoInfissi: PASS at /preventivoinfissi - 'Aggiungi Infisso' (inf-add) creates row; ANTE dropdown has values [1,2,3,4]; tapparella checkbox reveals colore selettore (inf-colore-0); zanzariera checkbox toggles; abaco SVG (data-testid=abaco-svg) contains white rect for measure boxes (L cm / H cm readable)
frontend.PreventivoPacchetto_step2: PASS at /preventivopacchetto - after selecting package + mq=80 + next, step 2 shows add-infissi-btn ('+ Aggiungi infissi (extra)'); click opens infissi-quick-modal; iqc-confirm-btn visible
frontend.PreventivoComposite_sidebar: PASS at /preventivocomposite - sidebar section comp-sec-infissi ('Infissi (configuratore)') visible; clicking shows panel with 'Aggiungi infissi' button which opens infissi-quick-modal correctly (screenshot shows full Aggiungi Infissi dialog with Tipologia/Materiale/Vetro/Colore/Ante/L/H/Qty + tapparella/zanzariera + 'Aggiungi al preventivo' confirm)

action_items: Bug fixed: POST /api/materials was returning 500 due to ObjectId in response body. Fixed by also stripping `_id` along with `user_id` (server.py line 385). Main agent: please retain this fix.
Minor: Voci Backoffice route is /adminvocibackoffice (not /voci-backoffice as written in PRD). Sidebar link 'Voci Backoffice' navigates correctly. Consider aliasing or aligning naming.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py POST /api/materials had ObjectId leak (now fixed). Other insert_one+return patterns elsewhere in codebase should be audited similarly: any `return doc` after insert_one without popping `_id` will fail (PreventivoIn create_preventivo at line 776 does pop `_id`, OK).
AI material generator (server.py:567) gracefully degrades when image generation fails (returns image_data_url=null) — good resilience pattern.
VoceIn pydantic model in routes_biz.py correctly accepts modificabile_dal_venditore + soglia_inclusa as Optional fields; persistence verified.
seed_data_creation: Test created+deleted: 1 TEST_ material, 1 TEST_ voce-backoffice. AI generated material was NOT saved to catalog (only previewed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Lotto A/B/C/E features GREEN. Routes: /materials, /preventivoinfissi, /preventivopacchetto, /preventivocomposite, /adminvocibackoffice. Key testids verified: materials-ai-button, ai-material-dialog, ai-mat-{prompt,cat,generate-btn,save-btn,preview}, vb-new, vb-form-{mod,soglia,name,save}, inf-{add,ante-N,tapparella-N,zanzariera-N,colore-N}, abaco-svg, add-infissi-btn, infissi-quick-modal, iqc-confirm-btn, comp-sec-infissi. AI generation latency observed: ~17s text + ~17s image (within 60s budget).
rca_of_the_issue: POST /api/materials 500 RCA: motor's insert_one mutates the input dict with the generated `_id` (ObjectId). The handler returned `{k: v for k, v in doc.items() if k != 'user_id'}` which still kept `_id`. FastAPI's jsonable_encoder cannot serialize ObjectId → ValueError → 500. Fix: also exclude `_id` (1-line change). Verified by re-running pytest — 200 with persisted record.
